challenges.title: Inline-Block Elements
challenges.description: Write CSS that targets elements with class 'box' and sets their display to inline-block, gives them a width of 150px, and a height of 100px. Assign your CSS to the variable `css`.
challenges.test_code:
assert 'inline-block' in css.lower(), 'Should use display: inline-block'
assert '.box' in css.lower(), 'Should target the .box class'
assert 'width' in css.lower(), 'Should set a width'
assert '150px' in css, 'Width should be 150px'
assert 'height' in css.lower(), 'Should set a height'
assert '100px' in css, 'Height should be 100px'
hints: Use display: inline-block to make elements flow inline but accept width/height.
Target the .box class and set display, width, and height properties.

challenges.title: Inline-Block Whitespace and Alignment
challenges.description: Write CSS that targets a container with class 'nav' and sets font-size to 0 to fix inline-block whitespace gaps. Then target '.nav a' elements, set them to display inline-block, set font-size back to 16px, set vertical-align to middle, and add padding of 10px 20px. Assign your CSS to the variable `css`.
challenges.test_code:
assert '.nav' in css.lower(), 'Should target the .nav container'
assert 'font-size' in css.lower(), 'Should use font-size'
assert 'font-size: 0' in css.lower().replace(' ', '').replace(': ', ':') or 'font-size:0' in css.lower().replace(' ', ''), 'Should set font-size to 0 on the container'
assert 'inline-block' in css.lower(), 'Should use display: inline-block on links'
assert 'vertical-align' in css.lower(), 'Should use vertical-align'
assert 'middle' in css.lower(), 'Should set vertical-align to middle'
assert '16px' in css, 'Should reset font-size to 16px on child elements'
assert 'padding' in css.lower(), 'Should add padding to the links'
hints: Setting font-size: 0 on the parent removes whitespace gaps between inline-block children.
Remember to reset font-size on the child elements so text is visible.
vertical-align: middle aligns inline-block elements along their midpoints.
